subject: Daein
fact: Daein failed to hit his mark when attempting to snipe Veris.
source_quote: Daein attempts to snipe Veris with a longbow but misses both shots

subject: The party
fact: The party noted that Felkur's manipulation of the teleport system had weakened the tower's protections.
source_quote: The party notes that Felkur's manipulation of the teleport system has weakened the tower's protections

subject: The party
fact: The party discussed the tactical implications of being restrained while facing the Stone Golem.
source_quote: The party discusses the tactical implications of being restrained while facing the Stone Golem

subject: Veris
fact: Veris realized he was losing the battle.
source_quote: Realizing he is losing the battle

subject: Veris
fact: Veris declared with cold menace that there was no escape for Felkur.
source_quote: declaring 'Now, Felkur, there is no escape'

subject: Felkur
fact: Felkur considered dropping his cannon down the chute to detonate it in the library below as a distraction.
source_quote: Felkur considers dropping his cannon down the chute to detonate it in the library below as a distraction

subject: The party
fact: The party hoped to buy themselves precious time against the wave of demons by raising a barrier.
source_quote: hoping to buy themselves precious time against the wave of demons surging upward

subject: Felkur
fact: Felkur intended to detonate his cannon as a diversion to draw the archmage away from the battle.
source_quote: intending to detonate it as a diversion that would draw the archmage away from the battle entirely

subject: Felkur
fact: Felkur planned to detonate his cannon as a diversion to keep the archmage from interfering with the battle.
source_quote: planning to detonate it as a diversion to keep the archmage from interfering with the battle above

subject: Felkur
fact: Felkur was startled and apologetic after realizing his cannon's blast would scorch his allies.
source_quote: Startled and apologetic after realizing his cannon's flamethrower blast would also scorch his own allies trapped in the webs

subject: Felkur
fact: Felkur joked with the GM about accidentally installing ClaudeBot after the interface broke.
source_quote: Joking with the GM after the Roll20 interface broke and started scrolling uncontrollably mid-combat

subject: Bramgrim
fact: Bramgrim struggled to maintain concentration on his Spirit Guardians after being caught in the poisonous cloud.
source_quote: Bramgrim struggles to maintain concentration on his Spirit Guardians after being caught in the poisonous cloud

subject: Veris
fact: Veris was desperate to regain control of the battlefield.
source_quote: Veris, desperate to regain control of the battlefield

subject: Veris
fact: Veris made a desperate gambit to turn the tide.

subject: Veris
fact: Veris made a desperate last stand as the party closed in.
source_quote: making a desperate last stand as the rest of the party closes in

subject: Felkur
fact: Felkur maneuvered his cannon with the intention of creating a bold tactical gambit.
source_quote: A bold tactical gambit — sacrificing the cannon to guarantee Vraxen would abandon the fight and rush to save his precious library
